metadata.name: PCI DSS Scope Control
metadata.description: Identifies nodes and relationships in the PCI DSS cardholder data environment. Services that process, store, or transmit payment card data must declare pci-in-scope: true in metadata. Relationships involving PCI data flows must declare pci-in-scope: true.
references: PCI DSS v4.0 — Requirement 1.3: Restrict inbound and outbound traffic
PCI DSS v4.0 — Requirement 12.5: Maintain an inventory of system components in scope

control.assertion: Service nodes handling payment card data must declare 'pci-in-scope: true' in metadata. In-scope services: svc-payments. In-scope external systems: Fraud Detection API, Payment Gateway, Stripe API.
control.remediation: Add 'pci-in-scope: true' to the metadata block of any service node that processes, stores, or transmits payment card data. Update pci.yaml to register the service in the PCI scope registry. Engage the security team for a PCI impact assessment before introducing new services to the cardholder data environment.
